title: Treatment
description: Treatment applied to biological samples or systems. A ChEBI or UniProt controlled term for the treatment agent, with optional quantity and duration.

ontological_term.title: Ontological Term
ontological_term.description: ChEBI or UniProt controlled term for the treatment agent.
ontological_term.comment: See controlled_term.json for available identifiers. Prefer terms with ontology_source 'CHEBI' or 'UniProt'.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Specific quantity of the applied treatment (used in conjunction with amount_units).
amount.comment: This property is affected by dependencies. See dependentSchemas.

amount_units.title: Amount Units
amount_units.description: A unit for an amount other than those for time or temperature.
amount_units.comment: This property is affected by dependencies. See dependentSchemas.
